_meta.purpose: Canonical per-country structural overlay for the FoodShield frontend. index.html remains a fallback only; this file is the preferred source for baseline structural metrics and trade snapshots.

quality_flags.sourced: Verified against a public dataset; source_url + as_of populated.
quality_flags.legacy_curated: Hand-authored heritage value, not yet re-verified. Treated as draft.
quality_flags.legacy_import_dependency: Heritage value originally meant 'fraction of consumption imported' (0-100), NOT the caloric-share definition the field name now implies. Mis-display would be misleading; UI should treat as import-dependency only until replaced by FBS-sourced caloric share.
quality_flags.modeled: Computed from sourced inputs or explicit structural assumptions.
quality_flags.manual: Hand-maintained snapshot from an annual or static public release.

fields.c: 6-component structural FDRS vector [import_dep, supplier_conc, prod_trend, food_infl, climate, conflict].
fields.w: Wheat caloric share % (fraction of national caloric supply).
fields.fi: Food inflation baseline % (yr/yr). Live sources override this at render time.
fields.imports: Structural food import dependency list used by the dashboard. Not a live customs feed.
fields.exports: Structural food export basket used by the dashboard. Not a live customs feed.
fields.exportDests: Structural export-destination ranking used by the dashboard.
fields.suppliers: Structural top supplier countries used by the dashboard.
fields.supPct: Supplier concentration share weights paired with suppliers[].

source_priority: FAOSTAT Food Balance Sheets caloric shares (w/r/m) — when present
FAOSTAT Trade Crops & Livestock net food balance (net) — when present
Embedded legacy fallback extracted from index.html
notes: Caloric shares (w/r/m) come from FAOSTAT FBS; net food trade from FAOSTAT TCL.
Per-commodity import/supplier lists (imports, exports, suppliers, supPct) remain legacy_curated.
Food-only UI menus may be normalized at render time; canonical raw structural values remain stored here.
The frontend supports both the historical top-level countries schema and this v20.6 envelope schema for safe rollout.

fdrs.method: Legacy embedded structural score from index.html.
fdrs.note: Inherited from the embedded May 2026 country dataset in index.html. Needs source-by-source re-verification before it can be treated as observed trade.

c.method: Legacy embedded 6-factor structural vector from index.html.
c.note: Inherited from the embedded May 2026 country dataset in index.html. Needs source-by-source re-verification before it can be treated as observed trade.

f2030.note: Inherited from the embedded May 2026 country dataset in index.html. Needs source-by-source re-verification before it can be treated as observed trade.

w.source: FAOSTAT FBS — Sudan wheat caloric share (pre-war 2022 baseline)
w.note: Wheat heavily imported; conflict-disrupted supply chains since 2023. Verified pre-war FBS baseline; current consumption is much lower per WFP rapid assessments.

r.source: FAOSTAT FBS — Sudan rice caloric share

m.source: FAOSTAT FBS — Sudan direct maize caloric share
m.note: Sorghum and millet dominate domestic cereals more than maize.

fi.source: IMF / WFP — Sudan inflation Article IV indicators
fi.note: Sudan in active food crisis; IMF estimates triple-digit food inflation. SDG collapse + war disruption. Treat as exceptional, not comparable to peer countries.

net.method: Legacy embedded net agri-food trade estimate from index.html.
net.note: Inherited from the embedded May 2026 country dataset in index.html. Needs source-by-source re-verification before it can be treated as observed trade.

imports.method: Legacy embedded commodity list extracted from index.html.
imports.note: Structural dashboard snapshot only. The UI may normalize this into a food-only display; it is not a live customs ledger.

exports.method: Legacy embedded commodity list extracted from index.html.
exports.note: Structural dashboard snapshot only. The UI may normalize this into a food-only display; it is not a live customs ledger.

exportDests.method: Legacy embedded destination ranking extracted from index.html.
exportDests.note: Structural dashboard snapshot only. The UI may normalize this into a food-only display; it is not a live customs ledger.

suppliers.source: USDA PSD / Comtrade — Sudan top wheat origins
suppliers.method: Top bilateral wheat suppliers; WFP/USAID in-kind aid excluded from this commercial supplier list.
suppliers.note: Saudi Arabia/UAE/Egypt/Turkey are NOT primary commercial wheat suppliers; previous row was incorrect.

supPct.source: USDA PSD / Comtrade — Sudan supplier mix
